summary: Provision and operate AWS Security Hub. Enabling it account-wide with the default standards is an engineer-gated create form; disabling standards or controls removes compliance visibility and never auto-applies.

operations.title: Enable Security Hub
operations.summary: Enable Security Hub for the account with the default standards on. Disabling it removes compliance visibility.
operations.description: Create an aws_securityhub_account, enabling Security Hub for the account with the default standards and auto-enabled controls. Enablement is account-wide, so this is engineer-gated. Submitting drafts the resource and routes it to an engineer to review and finish.

params.name: account_label
params.label: Account label
params.help: A short label naming the Terraform block only; the account-level resource has no name attribute in AWS.

params.name: enable_default_standards
params.label: Enable default standards
params.help: Turn on the default security standards; written into the draft, never asked.

params.name: auto_enable_controls
params.label: Auto enable controls
params.help: Auto-enable new controls as standards add them; written into the draft, never asked.

params.name: control_finding_generator
params.label: Finding generator
params.help: SECURITY_CONTROL generates one finding per control across standards; STANDARD_CONTROL generates one per standard.

decisions: Enabling Security Hub is account-wide and turns on the default standards; disabling it or its controls removes compliance visibility, an engineer-reviewed change.
Individual control tuning and standards subscriptions are reviewed follow-up; this provisions the account enabled with the default standards on.
